blocks.single_subject: Exactly one isolated subject, centered, nothing else in frame.
blocks.isolated: Isolated on a fully transparent background, the entire subject visible and uncropped, with soft naturally feathered edges suitable for photo compositing.
blocks.isolated_overlay: Isolated on a fully transparent background with soft naturally feathered edges, produced as an overlay element for photo compositing.
blocks.photoreal: Photorealistic, production-quality photographic detail, natural lighting consistent with outdoor photography, realistic shadows falling only on the subject itself.
blocks.no_text: No text, no watermark, no caption, no border, no frame, no sticker sheet, no collage.

negative: text, watermark, logo, caption, border, frame, background, scenery, sky, ground, landscape, trees, buildings, people, multiple subjects, sticker sheet, grid, collage, cartoon, illustration, drawing, painting, 3d render, cgi, plastic toy, cropped, cut off, white background, colored background
